Introduction
    Na nin ha tin nei qie liu na lei is a movie starring Kuan Tai Chen, Ge Hu, and Josephine Koo. A traumatized young girl who was abducted 12 years ago is found alive. However, she carries out crimes on the orders of her abductor, and...
